zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Luxington於1195年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特。她於1211年與William Washington II結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1240年在英國戴文素斯 莫爾頓享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Luxington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Lutton in Northamptonshire named in Old English as Ludingtūn (see Lutton ) or from Luddington in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Ludintone, both named from the Old English personal name Luda + -ing- denoting association with + tūn ‘estate, settlement’.

variants.name: Lutton
meanings: habitational name from East and West Lutton in Weaverthorpe (East Yorkshire), or from Lutton in Sutton Saint Nicholas (Lincolnshire).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Luxington was born in 1195, in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. She married William Washington II in 1211. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1240, in South Molton, Devon, England, at the age of 46.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Luxington(은)는 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 수턴  트렌트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1211년 William Washington II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국 데폰 소우스 모턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.
